name: pipeline
description: Manage pipeline — continue a pipeline, trigger a new pipeline, [recommended] trigger a new pipeline. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: configuration
parameters.description: A configuration string for the pipeline.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: An object containing pipeline parameters and their values. Pipeline parameters have the following size limits: 100 max entries, 128 maximum key length, 512 maximum value length.
